prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document primarily addresses Shoreline Management Plans (SMPs) specific to England, developed and managed by the Environment Agency. Scotland has its own distinct framework and regulatory bodies for coastal management, including the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA), making this document not applicable to Scotland.
